data.title: Strict Access Control
data.description: Utilizes advanced IAM protocols to ensure only authorized personnel have access.
data.technical_spec: Enforced using OAuth2.0 and multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Data Encryption Methods
data.description: All sensitive data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using TLS 1.3 for data transmission and AES-256 for storage encryption.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Undergoes frequent penetration testing and security compliance assessments.
data.technical_spec: Conducted via third-party security firms and internal security teams.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: A WAF is used to block malicious traffic and prevent web attacks.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using F5 Networks for filtering and monitoring HTTP requests.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Implemented a Zero Trust security model to continuously verify access requests.
data.technical_spec: Orchestrated through Cisco Zero Trust solutions.
